What is your return policy?: Returns are accepted within 7 days of delivery.
How long does shipping take?: Shipping usually takes 3 to 5 business days.
Do you offer cash on delivery?: Yes, cash on delivery is available.
How can I track my order?: You can track your order using the tracking link sent to your email.
What payment methods are accepted?: We accept UPI, debit cards, credit cards and net banking.
Do you ship internationally?: Currently we only ship within India.
Can I cancel my order?: Orders can be cancelled before they are shipped.
Do you offer refunds?: Refunds are processed within 5 business days after approval.
Can I change my delivery address?: You can change your address before the order is shipped.
Are there any shipping charges?: Free shipping is available on orders above ₹999.
Do you provide exchange services?: Yes, exchanges are available within 7 days.
Can I receive my order earlier than the: Delivery dates are estimated and cannot usually be expedited after dispatch.
My order is delayed. What should I do?: You can track your shipment using the tracking link or contact support.
How do I know if my order has been shipp: You will receive an email and SMS confirmation once your order is shipped.
Can I modify my order after placing it?: Orders can only be modified before they are shipped.
What happens if I miss my delivery?: The courier will usually attempt delivery again or contact you.
How can I check my order status?: Use the tracking link provided in your shipping confirmation email.
Do you offer discounts?: Seasonal discounts and promotional offers are announced on our website and social media.
